chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl.No.527 of 2026 Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Justice Ms. Sana Akram Minhas. Shahzad..............Vs........................ The State 25.03.2026. Mr. Qurban Ali Shahani, Advocate for applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: On 08.11.2025 a police team of P.S. Shahrah-e- Noor Jehan, Karachi arrested applicant from Tanki ground Block-T, North Nazimabad, Karachi and recovered 1030 grams of Charas, hence he was booked in FIR bearing Cr. No.768/2025 U/s 6,9, (i) (c) CNS Amended Act, 2024 of P.S. Shahrah-e-Noor Jehan Karachi. 2. Learned counsel for applicant has pleaded for bail on the ground that applicant is innocent; the case has been challaned; he is no more required for further investigation; this case is a border line case and applicant has no criminal history. 3. On the other hand, learned DPG has opposed the bail on the ground of video recording of the incident which she emphasis is prima facie evidence against the applicant. 4. We have considered submissions of the parties and are of a view that prima facie there are reasonable grounds to assume that applicant is involved in the present case which is considered to be an offence against the society. This assumption is further strengthened by video recording of the incident, validity of which can only be appreciated after recording of evidence. We, therefore, do not find the applicant entitled to the concession of bail. His bail application is dismissed. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.

His bail application is dismissed. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The trial court is, however, shall accelerate the trial and conclude it in 04 months. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.K
